2606.22153.title: $π$-RAG: Oblivious Retrieval via Semantic Quantization and Transcendental Addressing for Large Language Models
2606.22153.paper_summary: This paper introduces $π$-RAG, a novel architecture for oblivious retrieval that decouples Large Language Models (LLMs) from sensitive data storage without sacrificing semantic understanding. Traditional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures expose raw vector embeddings to potential inversion attacks and nondeterministic retrieval failures. To address this, we utilize the digits of $π$ as a source of transcendental entropy, creating an immutable indirection layer between the LLM and private records. The value $π$ provides immutability, is uneditable and math governs it. The architecture also introduces a Semantic Quantization Layer. This layer projects user inputs onto a pre-computed manifold of Canonical Intent Centroids. RAG performs vector cosine similarity but here it maps the centroids to deterministic offsets via cryptographic salt. The resulting $π$-key is a pointer to standardized payload from the actual datastore. By replacing direct access to the datastore via LLM with this transcendental layer, $π$-RAG mathematically guarantees that the inference remains oblivious to the data. This architecture unifies deterministic randomness, auditability, and differential privacy, demonstrating high efficacy for high-compliance sectors such as finance and healthcare.
2606.22153.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了 $π$-RAG，一種新穎的無知檢索架構，將大型語言模型（LLMs）與敏感數據存儲解耦，而不犧牲語義理解。傳統的檢索增強生成（RAG）架構將原始向量嵌入暴露於潛在的反演攻擊和非確定性檢索失敗。為了解決這個問題，我們利用 $π$ 的數字作為超越熵的來源，創建了一個不變的間接層，將 LLM 與私有記錄隔開。值 $π$ 提供不變性，無法編輯，且由數學所支配。該架構還引入了一個語義量化層。這一層將用戶輸入投影到預計算的典範意圖重心流形上。RAG 執行向量餘弦相似度，但在這裡它通過加密鹽將重心映射到確定性偏移量。生成的 $π$-鍵是一個指向實際數據存儲中標準化有效負載的指針。通過用這個超越層替代 LLM 對數據存儲的直接訪問，$π$-RAG 在數學上保證推理對數據保持無知。該架構統一了確定性隨機性、可審計性和差異隱私，顯示出對於高合規性行業如金融和醫療保健的高效性。
2606.22153.author: Aniket Wattamwar et.al.
